audience_policies.source_phrase: Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free. MUSEUM HOURS: WEEKDAYS 11 AM – 5 PM | WEEKENDS 10 AM – 5 PM | THURSDAYS 11 AM – 9 PM | CLOSED TUESDAYS
